problem id: 813f2402
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(5)

examples:
  01111100 -> 00000011
  00010100 -> 00000000
  10101101 -> 00000101
  11110000 -> 00000111
  01101111 -> 00000011
  11000111 -> 00000110
  10111110 -> 00000101
  00001110 -> 00000000
  01101110 -> 00000011

query: 01110001
predicted answer: 00000011
